evidences.title: BITCOIN Historical Datasets 2018-2026 Binance API - Kaggle
evidences.content: Open time: The timestamp for when the interval began. Open: The price of Bitcoin at the beginning of the interval. High: The highest price during the interval. Low: The lowest price during the interval. Close: The price of Bitcoin at the end of the interval. Volume: The trading volume during the interval. Close time: The timestamp for when the interval closed. Quote asset volume: The total quote asset volume traded during the interval. Number of trades: The number of trades executed within the interval. Taker buy base asset volume: The volume of the base asset bought by takers. Taker buy quote asset volume: The volume of the quote asset spent by takers. Ignore: A placeholder column from Binance API, not used in analysis. ## Data Sources [...] ## Dataset Overview This dataset contains historical price data for Bitcoin (BTC/USDT) from January 1, 2018, to the present. The data is sourced using the Binance API, providing granular candlestick data in four timeframes: 15-minute (15M) 1-hour (1H) 4-hour (4H) 1-day (1D) This dataset includes the following fields for each timeframe: [...] 2018-01-01 13715.65 13818.55 12750.0 13380.0 8609.915844 2018-01-01 23:59:59.999 114799747.44197056...

evidences.content: Summary: Knowing when the candle opens and closes helps to understand who is winning the battle during that period: buyers or sellers. If it closed in the middle 👉 possible indecision. 3. Strategic times Some times have more impact because that’s when volume enters the market: 09:00 to 11:00 (Brasília) – Opening of the South American markets. 10:00 to 12:00 (New York opens) – Strong movement in cryptos. 21:00 to 23:00 – End of the day in the USA, start of Asia. evidences.title: ONCHAIN INSIDER's Profile | Binance Square
evidences.content: Structure Bullish: higher highs + higher lowsBearish: lower lows + lower highsBreak of structure: confirmed only when price breaches the most recent swing high/low. 2. Market Environments A. Momentum (Trending) Price consistently breaks through levels and continues in one direction.✅ Best for breakouts❌ Worst for reversals B. Mean-Reverting (Ranging) Price repeatedly bounces between similar highs/lows.✅ Best for reversals ❌ Worst for breakouts#btc #bitcoin {future}(BTCUSDT) [...] MARKET STRUCTURE EXPLAINED When price approaches any support/resistance level you have 3 types of decisions: 1️⃣→ Bet on a breakout (Momentum). 2️⃣→ Bet on a bounce (Mean reversion). 3️⃣→ Take no trade. As a Trader you have to get used to picking Option 3... a lot. Before jumping into a trade it can be quite helpful to have a little bit of context. Looking at the current Market Structure is a good place to start. 🐂Bullish Market Structure: higher highs and higher lows.🐻Bearish Market Structure: lower lows and lower highs. Break in Market Structure Just because price currently has Bullish Structure doesn't mean that it will just go up forever. There are going to be times where the structure "breaks" and...

evidences.title: $ZEC ANALYSIS UPDATE 28-11 7:00 UTC | ONCHAIN INSIGHTS en Binance Square
evidences.content: # $ZEC ANALYSIS UPDATE 28-11 7:00 UTC. Key Support 4H: 435 USDT. Key Resistance H: 517 USDT. $ZEC Current Trend: Clear Downtrend (Bearish). K-line analysis shows a series of lower highs and lower lows since the 687 peak. The recent break below 474 on high volume confirms bearish continuation. The long wick to 446 suggests some buying interest, but failure to reclaim 490 indicates weak demand. 1. evidences.title: Fetch.ai Ocean Protocol SingularityNET will soon merge into ASI | 进击的韭菜 on Binance Square
evidences.content: Binance will suspend the deposit and withdrawal services of Fetch.ai (FET), Ocean Protocol (OCEAN) and SingularityNET (AGIX) tokens at 11:30 (ET) on July 1, 2024. Binance will stop trading and delist all existing FET, OCEAN, and AGIX spot trading pairs at 11:00 a.m. ET on July 1, 2024. Binance Margin will remove AGIX/BTC, AGIX/USDT, FET/BTC, FET/USDT, OCEAN/BTC, and OCEAN/USDT full and isolated margin trading pairs at 14:00 (UTC) on June 26, 2024. Starting from 14:00 (ET) on June 26, 2024, users who enable the unified account mode will automatically convert the FET, OCEAN, and AGIX balances in their full-margin leverage wallets into USDT. Binance Collateralized Loans (current and fixed rates) and VIP Loans will remove FET, OCEAN, and AGIX from the available borrowing and collateral currencies at 11:00 (ET) on June 25, 2024, and automatically close and liquidate outstanding orders of the above currencies as borrowing or collateral currencies. Binance Earn will stop providing FET, OCEAN and AGIX current and fixed deposit products from 11:00 on June 28, 2024 (GMT+8), and users will no longer be able to subscribe.
